rag_rules: Repair validator diagnostics by adding missing architecture only when necessary to resolve references
Use only visible AADL features or eq helpers declared in the same annex for guarantees
Align helper declaration types with expression types to resolve type mismatches
Use AGREE scalar type names int, real, and bool for const and eq declarations
generic_rules: Place input envelope assumptions and output range guarantees in component type contracts
Use assign only for implementation contracts when the left-hand side is an existing output feature or auxiliary variable
Avoid package-qualified identifiers, data types, or property references absent from the analyzed model
Ensure all references in AGREE annexes are resolvable within the current scope
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use const for named constants and eq for helper declarations in AGREE annexes
Use assume for input constraints and guarantee for output constraints in component type contracts
Use assign for output assignments in implementation contracts
anti_patterns: Do not place guarantee statements in implementation scope
Avoid using subcomponent ports in component type contracts unless represented through variables or outputs
Do not introduce package-qualified identifiers, data types, or property references absent from the analyzed model
Do not use AGREE scalar type names like integer or boolean; use int, real, and bool instead
irrelevant_topics: ARINC653 property associations and recovery actions
